claim_reviews.evidence: Matrix-multiply maps to GPU SIMD. Comparison is against own prior kernel.
claim_reviews.concerns: Relative to own implementation, not external baseline.

claim_reviews.evidence: Fused expand+mark+compact keeps all work on-GPU. CF convergent = 2x2 matrix multiply.

overall_assessment: Engineering finding. 175x speedup is real. Matrix-CF equivalence is classical. Correctly scoped.
certification_justification: Engineering optimization, no direct literature precedent for this kernel.
